title: poa nemoralis subsp. coarctata
intro: Poa nemoralis subsp. coarctata, also known as the woodland meadow-grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the genus Poa and is native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Poa nemoralis subsp. coarctata is traditionally prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional folk medicine.
